message:
Complete FrankenTUI bead coverage with all Master TODO items

Added 9 more beads to fully cover the Master TODO Inventory:

NEW BEADS:
- bd-22q: Theme system with semantic color slots (Section F)
- bd-1mh: HitGrid for mouse hit testing (Section H)
- bd-3i6: Bracketed paste + SGR mouse protocol (Section E)
- bd-27v: Subscriptions + async command integration (Section G)
- bd-3mo: Markup parsing for styled text (Section F/I)
- bd-2dc: Status Line and Panel widgets (Section H)
- bd-cw8: Markdown renderer (Section I)
- bd-2fx: Export adapters HTML/SVG/Text (Section I)
- bd-2rs: Clipboard integration OSC 52 (Section I)

FINAL STRUCTURE:
- Total beads: 82
- Dependencies: 94 edges
- No cycles
- Actionable: 15 ready to start
- All Master TODO Inventory items (A-K) now covered

Every bead includes:
- Complete technical requirements with code examples
- Design rationale and background
- Acceptance criteria with checkboxes
- Test requirements
- Performance budgets where applicable

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
